full_prompt: Design a split cast-iron plummer block bearing housing that interfaces with a canonical size-220 spherical roller bearing and accepts a standard plummer-block seal interface. The representative 2024 bearing catalog values for the size-220 spherical roller bearing are: bore d = 100 mm, outside diameter D = 180 mm, width B = 46 mm, dynamic load rating C = 475 kN, static load rating C0 = 600 kN, fatigue load limit Pu = 62 kN. The paired plummer-block housing has overall length 470 mm, base width 160 mm, total height 280 mm, base-to-shaft-center height 110 mm, foot bolt pattern with four M20 bolts on a 370 x 130 mm rectangular footprint, and a split line along the bearing centerline plane. The housing must accept adapter sleeve-mounted shafting up to 90 mm nominal and tolerate +/- 0.5 degree of static angular misalignment (spherical roller inherent capability). Design load cases: LC1 radial load on the bearing Fr = 150 kN (about C/3, consistent with P/C0 ~= 0.25 sizing practice); LC2 combined radial+axial Fr = 120 kN + Fa = 40 kN (ratio Fa/Fr = 0.33, within spherical roller Y1/Y2 envelope); LC3 bolt preload only (4 x M20 grade 8.8 tightened to 410 N*m per standard industrial housing bolt torque table, generating approximately 158 kN clamping force per bolt). Pass/fail: (R1) housing cap half and base half cast-iron (EN-GJS-500-7, yield ~= 320 MPa, ultimate ~= 500 MPa) max von Mises stress <= 200 MPa (SF = 2.5 on yield, industrial machinery standard per industrial bearing housing design guide); (R2) bolt shank max tensile stress <= 0.7 * 640 = 448 MPa (preload limit for grade 8.8 per VDI 2230); (R3) bearing-seat out-of-roundness after load application <= 0.02 mm (industrial bearing catalog misalignment/clearance tolerance); (R4) vertical deflection at shaft centerline under LC1 <= 0.05 mm (stiffness to preserve bearing internal clearance C3); (R5) interface contact pressure at split line under LC1 must remain compressive everywhere (no gap opening). The housing is grey cast iron or ductile iron poured to EN-GJS-500-7, machined bore to ISO H7 at 180 mm, base-to-bore perpendicularity IT7, and sealed against IP65-equivalent labyrinth grease seals. Deliverables: STEP AP242 assembly with cap half, base half, seal rings, and bolt envelopes; geometry must parametrically accept the size-220 spherical roller bearing envelope without interference; report with max housing stress, bolt stress, bore distortion, shaft-center deflection, and split-line contact margin.
short_prompt:
Design a split cast-iron plummer block bearing housing that interfaces with a canonical size-220 spherical roller bearing (bore 100 mm, OD 180 mm, width 46 mm) and accepts a standard plummer-block seal interface. The housing accepts adapter sleeve-mounted shafting up to 90 mm nominal and tolerates +/- 0.5 degree static angular misalignment.

Envelope: overall length 470 mm, base width 160 mm, total height 280 mm, base-to-shaft-center height 110 mm, foot bolt pattern of four M20 bolts on a 370 x 130 mm rectangular footprint, with a split line along the bearing centerline plane.

Material: EN-GJS-500-7 ductile iron; bore machined to ISO H7 at 180 mm.

Load cases.
- LC1 radial on bearing: Fr = 150 kN.
- LC2 combined radial + axial: Fr = 120 kN + Fa = 40 kN.
- LC3 bolt preload only: 4 x M20 grade 8.8 tightened to 410 N*m, generating approximately 158 kN clamping force per bolt (per VDI 2230).

Serviceability: bearing-seat out-of-roundness after load <= 0.02 mm; vertical deflection at shaft centerline under LC1 <= 0.05 mm; split-line contact must remain compressive everywhere under LC1.

requires_non_fea_solver.reason: L10 rating life L10 = (C/P)^(10/3) for roller bearings is a closed-form catalog formula, not FEA.
VDI 2230 preload + embedding + settling is a closed-form spreadsheet, not FEA.

prompt.title: Split plummer-block housing for size-220 spherical roller bearing
prompt.brief: Design a split cast-iron bearing housing accepting a size-220 spherical roller bearing with published C=475 kN, C0=600 kN, Pu=62 kN, under combined radial+axial load and M20 grade 8.8 bolt preload.

boundary_conditions.bearing_outer_race_contact: bearing load distributed over bearing seat per bearing contact patch

objective.minimize: housing mass subject to passing all stress/stiffness checks

pass_fail_criteria.derivation: yield / 1.6 (SF 2.5 effective on yield for cast iron industrial housing per industrial bearing housing design guide)
standard mounting tolerance for preserving bearing clearance class C3
stiffness to preserve spherical roller C3 internal clearance
no gap opening under service load (compressive everywhere)

requirements.governing_standard: industrial bearing catalog 2024 + standard industrial housing bolt torque table + VDI 2230 Part 1

analysis_types: linear static with bolt preload + contact at split line

exclusions_explained.vibration_analysis: Bearing resonance check is a separate variant using bearing dynamic analysis software.
exclusions_explained.thermal_analysis: Grease lubrication thermal balance is out of scope.

notes.numeric_source: Industrial bearing catalog 2024: size-220 spherical roller dynamic rating C=475 kN, static C0=600 kN, fatigue limit Pu=62 kN. Standard industrial torque table M20 grade 8.8 tightening torque 410 Nm.

eval_coverage: bolt preload + split line contact modeling
